title: sophora flavescens var. angustifolia
intro: Sophora flavescens var. angustifolia, also known as the narrowleaf sophora or Chinese kudzu, is a variety of the Sophora flavescens plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and improving digestion. Sophora flavescens var. angustifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
